summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, so no shared canonical is selected. No GitHub mutations are planned; closed PRs are kept closed, active/waiting/review-loop PRs are scoped to human follow-up, and the remaining open PRs are kept independent for normal maintainer review.

actions.reason: Independent open PR; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed in plan mode.
